name: Test login behavior when server returns 500 Internal Server Error
description: This test intercepts the login.js script and replaces it with a version that always displays an error, simulating a broken backend. It verifies that the UI shows the error message even when correct credentials are used.
descriptionHtml: This test intercepts the login.js script and replaces it with a version that always displays an error, simulating a broken backend. It verifies that the UI shows the error message even when correct credentials are used.

testStage.description: This test intercepts the login.js script and replaces it with a version that always displays an error, simulating a broken backend. It verifies that the UI shows the error message even when correct credentials are used.

steps.name: Mock login.js to simulate a 500 server error
